description: Test fixture: Application that should receive a PASS verdict

observability.metrics: Prometheus + Grafana, all golden signals tracked, p50/p95/p99 latency histograms, custom business metrics (payment success rate, settlement latency)
observability.logging: Structured JSON logs via Fluentd to BigQuery, correlation IDs propagated, PII redacted, 90-day retention
observability.tracing: OpenTelemetry with Jaeger, full trace propagation across 12 microservices, span annotations for payment stages
observability.alerting: PagerDuty integration, dual burn-rate SLO alerts (fast 2% / slow 5%), escalation policy defined, alert dedup via labels
observability.dashboards: Service-level Grafana dashboards, golden signals view, SLO burn-down, single-pane service health

slos.error_budget_policy: Automated tracking, feature freeze at 50% budget consumed, mandatory reliability sprint at 25%

incident_management.on_call: 24/7 primary + secondary rotation, 6 engineers, PagerDuty managed
incident_management.runbooks: 32 runbooks covering all known failure modes, reviewed monthly, accessible via Confluence
incident_management.incident_process: Defined severity levels (SEV1-4), IC/Comms/Scribe roles, Slack war rooms auto-created, status page integration
incident_management.postmortems: Blameless postmortems for all SEV1/SEV2, tracked in Jira, 95% action item completion rate, shared in weekly eng all-hands

resilience.fault_tolerance: Multi-region active-active, no SPOFs identified, database with automatic failover
resilience.patterns: Circuit breakers (Hystrix), retries with exponential backoff + jitter, timeouts on all external calls, bulkhead isolation per payment provider
resilience.capacity: HPA based on payment TPS, load tested quarterly to 3x peak, capacity model maintained
resilience.dr: RTO: 5 min, RPO: 0, automated failover tested monthly, backups verified weekly

deployment.cicd: Fully automated GitHub Actions pipeline, unit (90% coverage) + integration + e2e tests, SAST/DAST scanning, immutable container images
deployment.strategy: Canary deployments via Argo Rollouts, automated analysis on error rate + latency, progressive rollout 1% -> 10% -> 50% -> 100%
deployment.rollback: Automated rollback on SLO breach (<2 min), backward-compatible DB migrations, break-glass instant rollback
deployment.change_management: All changes tracked in Jira, approval required for P1 services, change freeze windows during peak shopping
